title: Consistency relations of amplitude and phase fluctuations of gravitational waves magnified by strong gravitational lensing
summary: We discuss the amplitude and phase fluctuations of gravitational waves due to wave optics lensing in the presence of both a strong lens and cosmological weak lenses. By applying the geometric optics approximation to the strong lens and treating the weak lensing potential perturbatively, we obtain the amplification factor up to the second order in the weak lensing potential. Additionally, we establish a methodology to systematically evaluate the weak lensing effects based on diagrammatic rules. Based on the derived amplification factor, we evaluate the statistics of the fluctuations and demonstrate that the consistency relations originally established in the absence of a strong lens still hold in exactly the same form when a strong lens is present. The physical origin of these relations is also discussed. Furthermore, we demonstrate that for the mean of the weak lensing signal, both the magnification of the signal and the shift of the Fresnel scale to larger scales occur, consistent with the behavior observed in the variance.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了引力波在同时存在强透镜和宇宙学弱透镜情况下的波光学透镜效应，推导了放大因子并建立了系统评估弱透镜效应的图规则方法。
AI.motivation: 研究引力波在同时存在强透镜和弱透镜情况下的振幅和相位波动，探索波光学透镜效应，特别是验证一致性关系在强透镜存在时是否仍然成立。
AI.method: 对强透镜应用几何光学近似，对弱透镜势进行微扰处理，推导出弱透镜势二阶的放大因子，并建立基于图规则的系统评估弱透镜效应的方法论。
AI.result: 证明了在无强透镜时建立的一致性关系在存在强透镜时仍以完全相同的形式成立；发现弱透镜信号的均值既表现出信号的放大，又出现菲涅尔尺度向更大尺度的移动，与方差中的行为一致。
AI.conclusion: 强透镜的存在不影响弱透镜的一致性关系，且弱透镜效应在均值层面表现出放大和尺度移动的双重特征，为引力波透镜效应的系统研究提供了理论框架。

recommendation.reason: 该论文直接研究强引力透镜效应，与用户的核心研究领域（强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜）高度吻合。虽然论文主题是引力波透镜而非光学/射电波段星系透镜，但强透镜的物理和数学框架是通用的，且用户兴趣画像中'lensing'和'gravitational lensing: strong'权重极高。论文方法涉及波光学透镜效应和微扰处理，与用户关注的透镜建模方法有交集。无负面关键词匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 极高。论文核心主题为强引力透镜，完全匹配用户的首要兴趣领域。
recommendation.method_fit: 高。论文使用几何光学近似和微扰理论处理透镜效应，与用户兴趣画像中的透镜建模方法相关。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。作者不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文提出一致性关系在强透镜存在时仍成立，具有一定新颖性，但方法基于已有理论框架。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无。论文不涉及用户明确排除的领域（如恒星物理、纯宇宙学、粒子物理等）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们讨论了在同时存在强透镜和宇宙弱透镜的情况下，引力波因波光学透镜效应而产生的振幅和相位涨落。通过对强透镜应用几何光学近似，并将弱透镜势作为微扰处理，我们得到了弱透镜势二阶的放大因子。此外，我们建立了一种基于图解规则系统评估弱透镜效应的方法。基于推导出的放大因子，我们评估了涨落的统计特性，并证明了最初在没有强透镜的情况下建立的一致性关系，在存在强透镜时仍以完全相同的形式成立。还讨论了这些关系的物理起源。此外，我们证明了对于弱透镜信号的均值，同时发生了信号的放大和菲涅耳尺度向更大尺度的移动，这与在方差中观察到的行为一致。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：强透镜的存在不影响弱透镜的一致性关系，且弱透镜效应在均值层面表现出放大和尺度移动的双重特征，为引力波透镜效应的系统研究提供了理论框架。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Gravitational lensing geometry. We adopt a coordinate system \((\chi,\bm{\theta})\) with the origin at the source, where \(\chi\) is the comoving distance from the source and \(\bm{\theta}\) is the two-dimensional vector perpendicular to the line of sight. The observer’s position is denoted by \((\chi_{s},\bm{\theta}_{s})\) . The strong lens component is treated using the thin-lens and geometric optics approximations, while the weak lens potential is treated perturbatively within the framework of wave optics.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：引力透镜几何结构。我们采用以源为原点的坐标系 \((\chi,\bm{\theta})\) ，其中 \(\chi\) 是来自源的共动距离，\(\bm{\theta}\) 是垂直于视线方向的二维向量。观测者的位置记为 \((\chi_{s},\bm{\theta}_{s})\) 。强透镜分量采用薄透镜和几何光学近似处理，而弱透镜势则在波光学框架内作为微扰处理。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Summary of diagrammatic rules and their corresponding mathematical expressions. The table defines the propagator and the two distinct types of vertices representing the strong and weak lensing potentials, respectively. The explicit mathematical form of the propagator is given by Eq. ( 2.18 ). The amplification factor is constructed by arranging these diagrammatic elements.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：图解规则及其对应数学表达式的总结。表格定义了传播子以及分别代表强透镜和弱透镜势的两种不同类型顶点。传播子的显式数学形式由方程( 2.18 )给出。放大因子通过排列这些图解元素构建。

title: Galaxy formation in the first billion years
comment: Based on lectures presented at the 54th Saas-Fee Advanced Course "Galaxies and Black Holes in the First Billion Years as seen by JWST", January 2025
summary: These notes present material from lectures given at the 54th Saas-Fee Advanced Course of the Swiss Society of Astrophysics and Astronomy in January 2025, entitled "Galaxies and Black Holes in the First Billion Years as seen by the JWST", and are intended for early career researchers or those new to the sub-field. My lectures covered the theory of galaxy formation with a focus on the first billion years of cosmic evolution. In these notes, I discuss cosmological structure formation, properties of dark matter halos at $z\gtrsim 6$, and whether any of the JWST observations to date present a serious and fundamental challenge for the $Λ$ Cold Dark Matter Paradigm. I then give an overview of physical processes and modeling techniques, including translating simulation-based quantities to observables, and discuss recent progress and future directions in galaxy formation modeling. The closing section presents a summary of some of the theoretical puzzles and challenges raised by the first three years of high redshift observations with JWST, and how our models of galaxy formation may need to be revised to accommodate them.

AI.tldr: JWST对宇宙早期星系和黑洞的观测对Λ冷暗物质模型提出了挑战，需要修订星系形成理论
AI.motivation: JWST观测到宇宙最初10亿年的星系和黑洞，这些观测结果可能对Λ冷暗物质范式构成根本性挑战，需要理论模型进行相应调整
AI.method: 结合宇宙学结构形成理论、暗物质晕特性分析、模拟到观测量的转换技术，以及星系形成建模方法
AI.result: JWST前三年的高红移观测提出了理论难题和挑战，表明现有星系形成模型需要修订以适应新观测数据
AI.conclusion: JWST观测为早期宇宙研究提供了革命性数据，对Λ冷暗物质范式构成挑战，需要重新思考星系形成理论以解释观测到的现象

recommendation.reason: 该论文是星系形成理论的综述，聚焦于JWST对宇宙早期（z>6）的观测及其对ΛCDM模型的挑战。虽然涉及高红移星系和暗物质，与用户兴趣中的'cosmic noon'、'massive main-sequence galaxy'、'dense gas'等有部分重叠，但论文是宽泛的理论综述，未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或运动学、多相气体等用户核心关注的具体方法或科学问题。用户核心作者均未出现。因此，相关性中等偏低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配。论文主题为早期宇宙星系形成，与用户关注的'cosmic noon'、'massive main-sequence galaxy'等有重叠，但用户更聚焦于具体物理过程（如尘埃、致密气体、磁场）和强透镜技术，而非宽泛的理论挑战。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文主要综述理论建模和模拟，未涉及用户核心的强引力透镜方法、高红移星系动力学/运动学分析、偏振测量或多相气体观测。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者Rachel S. Somerville不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文总结了JWST最新观测对理论的挑战，具有一定新颖性，但作为综述，并非原创研究。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文为宽泛的理论综述，缺乏用户核心关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学/运动学、偏振或多相气体等具体研究内容。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 这些笔记整理了作者在2025年1月瑞士天体物理与天文学学会第54届Saas-Fee高级课程（题为“JWST视角下最初十亿年中的星系与黑洞”）上所做的讲座内容，主要面向早期职业研究者或该子领域的新人。讲座聚焦于星系形成理论，特别关注宇宙演化最初十亿年。在这些笔记中，作者讨论了宇宙结构形成、红移$z\gtrsim 6$时暗物质晕的性质，以及迄今为止JWST的观测是否对Λ冷暗物质范式构成了严重且根本性的挑战。随后，作者概述了物理过程和建模技术，包括将基于模拟的量转化为可观测量的方法，并讨论了星系形成建模的最新进展和未来方向。结尾部分总结了JWST高红移观测最初三年所引发的一些理论难题和挑战，以及我们的星系形成模型可能需要如何修订以适应这些观测结果。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：JWST观测为早期宇宙研究提供了革命性数据，对Λ冷暗物质范式构成挑战，需要重新思考星系形成理论以解释观测到的现象。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Halo mass functions (HMF) from the GUREFT N-body simulation suite shown at \(z=0\) , 2, 6, 10, 15, 20, 25, and 30, compared with commonly used halo mass functions from analytic models and extrapolations of fitting functions based on lower resolution simulations that were not analyzed at ultra-high redshift (see Yung2024a and Yung2025 for details). The bottom panels show the fractional difference of the number density of halos from these HMFs relative to the GUREFT outputs. Halo mass functions that are commonly used in the literature can deviate from these robust N-body based results by up to an order of magnitude at ultra-high redshift. Based on Yung2024a , Fig. 5 and Yung2025 , Fig. A1.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：来自GUREFT N体模拟套件的晕质量函数（HMF），显示在\(z=0\)、2、6、10、15、20、25和30处，并与来自解析模型和基于未在超高红移下分析的低分辨率模拟的拟合函数外推的常用晕质量函数进行比较（详见Yung2024a和Yung2025）。底部面板显示了这些HMF的晕数密度相对于GUREFT输出的分数差异。文献中常用的晕质量函数在超高红移下可能偏离这些稳健的N体结果多达一个数量级。基于Yung2024a图5和Yung2025图A1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: UV luminosity functions at \(z=12\) , 14, 17, and 25, showing a compilation of recent observational estimates (see Yung2025 for details). The blue lines show the predicted UVLF from the simple empirical model described in the text, with a maximal baryon conversion efficiency \(\epsilon_{*}=1\) . The purple shaded regions show the predicted UVLF for the fitted functional form of \(\epsilon_{*}(M_{h},z)\) (Eqn. 3 ). The fact that the blue lines are everywhere higher than the observations implies that there is no fundamental tension between \(\Lambda\) CDM and these observations. Reproduced from Yung2025 , Fig. 4.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在\(z=12\)、14、17和25处的紫外光度函数，显示了近期观测估计的汇编（详见Yung2025）。蓝线显示了文中描述的简单经验模型预测的UVLF，其中最大重子转换效率\(\epsilon_{*}=1\)。紫色阴影区域显示了\(\epsilon_{*}(M_{h},z)\)（方程3）拟合函数形式预测的UVLF。蓝线处处高于观测值这一事实表明，\(\Lambda\)CDM与这些观测之间不存在根本性矛盾。复制自Yung2025图4。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The median (solid lines) and 16th and 84th percentiles (shaded regions) baryon conversion efficiency \(\epsilon_{*}(M_{h},z)\) obtained from fitting the empirical model described in the text to the observed UVLF. Darker lines and shaded regions show the approximate range of halo mass where there are current observational constraints. The required efficiencies of up to \(\sim 20\) –50 % are high, but perhaps not unphysically so. Reproduced from Yung2025 , Fig. 5.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：通过将文中描述的经验模型拟合到观测到的UVLF得到的重子转换效率\(\epsilon_{*}(M_{h},z)\)的中位数（实线）以及第16和第84百分位数（阴影区域）。较深的线条和阴影区域显示了当前存在观测约束的晕质量的大致范围。所需效率高达\(\sim 20\)–50%，虽然很高，但可能并非物理上不可能。复制自Yung2025图5。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Ratio of galaxy UV continuum radius to host dark matter halo radius, \(r_{e}/r_{vir}\) , as a function of redshift. The black diamonds and downward triangles indicate the results from pre-JWST studies of \(z\sim 4\) –8 star-forming galaxies. The red open circles and red filled circles represent the results of individual measurements of relatively luminous galaxies, and results from stacked images of fainter galaxies, respectively, at \(z\sim 10\) –16 from the analysis of Ono:2025 . The blue circles indicate spectroscopically confirmed galaxies. It is striking that the ratio of galaxy radius to DM halo virial radius at \(z\sim 10\) –16 is so similar to that at much lower redshifts. Reproduced from Ono:2025 , Fig. 20.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：星系紫外连续谱半径与宿主暗物质晕半径之比\(r_{e}/r_{vir}\)随红移的变化。黑色菱形和向下三角形表示来自JWST之前对\(z\sim 4\)–8恒星形成星系研究的结果。红色空心圆和红色实心圆分别代表来自Ono:2025分析中\(z\sim 10\)–16处相对明亮星系的单个测量结果和较暗星系堆叠图像的结果。蓝色圆圈表示光谱确认的星系。值得注意的是，在\(z\sim 10\)–16处，星系半径与暗物质晕维里半径之比与更低红移处的比值非常相似。复制自Ono:2025图20。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Fraction of baryonic mass within halos as a function of total halo mass at three redshifts, for simulations that include a spatially uniform, time-varying meta-galactic UV background. Hydrogen reionization is assumed to start at \(z=9\) . The top row shows all halos, and the bottom row shows isolated halos. After reionization, cooling and accretion is dramatically suppressed in halos below a critical mass, due to photo-ionization “squelching”. Reproduced from Okamoto:2008 , Fig. 2.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在三个红移处，对于包含空间均匀、随时间变化的星系际紫外背景的模拟，晕内重子质量分数作为总晕质量的函数。假设氢再电离始于\(z=9\)。顶行显示所有晕，底行显示孤立晕。再电离后，由于光电离“抑制”，低于临界质量的晕中的冷却和吸积被显著抑制。复制自Okamoto:2008图2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: ‘Cloud scale’ and ‘galaxy/halo scale’ feedback processes: Proto-stellar jets, stellar winds, ionization and heating from radiation from young massive stars (sometimes called ‘early stellar feedback’), and supernovae can disperse star forming clouds and drive turbulence in the ISM, reducing the cloud-scale (local) efficiency of star formation. In addition, supernovae explosions can drive galaxy-scale winds, which can eject gas from the ISM and inject thermal energy into the CGM and beyond, slowing cooling and reducing the gas inflow rate into the ISM.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：“云尺度”和“星系/晕尺度”反馈过程：原恒星喷流、恒星风、来自大质量年轻恒星的辐射电离和加热（有时称为“早期恒星反馈”），以及超新星，可以驱散恒星形成云并在星际介质中驱动湍流，降低云尺度（局部）恒星形成效率。此外，超新星爆炸可以驱动星系尺度风，将气体从星际介质中喷射出来，并将热能注入星系周介质及更远区域，减缓冷却并降低进入星际介质的气体流入率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Star formation efficiency per star forming cloud (left) and cloud lifetimes (in units of the free fall time (middle), and in Myr (right)) as a function of cloud surface density. The grey shaded regions represent the star formation efficiency (left panel), lifetimes (middle), and surface density range of GMCs in local universe star forming galaxies ( Chevance2023 ) . Symbols show cloud-scale star formation efficiencies (integrated over the cloud lifetime; left) and lifetimes (middle) from cloud-scale simulations by Lancaster2021 , Menonfesc2024 , and Kimjg2018 . The solid blue line in the left panel shows the analytic model of Eqn. 13 . The blue line in the middle panel is an empirical fit to the simulation results. Reproduced from Somerville:2025 , Fig. 1.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：每个恒星形成云的恒星形成效率（左图）和云寿命（以自由落体时间为单位（中图），以及以百万年为单位（右图））作为云面密度的函数。灰色阴影区域代表本地宇宙恒星形成星系中巨分子云的恒星形成效率（左面板）、寿命（中面板）和面密度范围（Chevance2023）。符号显示了来自Lancaster2021、Menonfesc2024和Kimjg2018的云尺度模拟的云尺度恒星形成效率（在云寿命内积分；左图）和寿命（中图）。左图中的蓝色实线显示了方程13的解析模型。中图中的蓝线是对模拟结果的经验拟合。复制自Somerville:2025图1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Face-on (top) and edge-on (bottom) projections for stellar surface density (left), gas surface density (middle) and thermal pressure (right) for a high resolution, idealized Large Magellanic Cloud analog simulation that resolves the multi-phase ISM and individual supernova explosions. One can see the pressure-driven, SN-inflated bubbles, which drive the large scale outflow visible in the bottom middle panel. Reproduced from Steinwandel:2024 , Fig. 1.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：一个高分辨率、理想化的大麦哲伦云类比模拟的正面（上）和侧面（下）投影，显示恒星面密度（左）、气体面密度（中）和热压力（右），该模拟解析了多相星际介质和单个超新星爆炸。可以看到压力驱动的、超新星膨胀的气泡，这些气泡驱动了底部中面板中可见的大尺度外流。复制自Steinwandel:2024图1。
